pilot_tasks.description: 2x2 factorial (A/B/C/D) with stochastic hierarchy noise (epsilon ~ N(0, 0.05))
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Condition B not significantly worse than D (delta < 0.05), Condition C not significantly better than A (delta < 0.05)
pilot_tasks.key_validation: B>D anomaly should replicate (B > D expected)

pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Absorption monotonically increases with hierarchy strength (no reversal)

pilot_tasks.task: H_Safe pilot: validated safety features on Gemma Scope
pilot_tasks.description: 5 validated safety + 5 non-safety features from Neuronpedia. NO arbitrary indices.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Safety and non-safety absorption distributions are measurable (not both zero)

pilot_tasks.task: H_Downstream pilot: matched pair steering test
pilot_tasks.description: 5 absorbed + 5 non-absorbed matched pairs. Test steering utility.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Absorbed vs non-absorbed steering difference > 5% (preliminary signal)
pilot_tasks.key_validation: Tests contrarian's core challenge - does absorption matter for downstream utility?
